Instructor Only: Model Output Plots Practice

Worked Reference

nhanes <- read_csv("data/real/nhanes_2021_2023_analysis.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)

model_data <- nhanes |>
  filter(age_years >= 18, !is.na(age_years), !is.na(gender), !is.na(systolic_mean))

bp_model <- lm(systolic_mean ~ age_years + gender, data = model_data)

prediction_data <- expand.grid(
  age_years = seq(20, 80, by = 5),
  gender = sort(unique(model_data$gender))
)

prediction_data <- cbind(
  prediction_data,
  as.data.frame(predict(bp_model, newdata = prediction_data, interval = "confidence"))
)

ggplot(prediction_data, aes(x = age_years, y = fit, color = gender, fill = gender)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lwr, ymax = upr), alpha = 0.15, color = NA) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  labs(
    title = "Model-Based Mean Systolic Blood Pressure By Age",
    x = "Age in years",
    y = "Predicted mean systolic blood pressure",
    color = "Gender",
    fill = "Gender"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
